mapper.select: SELECT t.dialogue_id as dialogueId, CASE WHEN LENGTH(t.content) > 10 THEN SUBSTRING(t.content, 1, 10) ELSE t.content END as content, t.creat_time as createTime FROM deepseek_dialogue_info t WHERE t.account = #{account} AND t.id IN ( SELECT MIN(id) FROM deepseek_dialogue_info WHERE account = #{account} GROUP BY dialogue_id ) ORDER BY t.creat_time DESC
